CrudExtensionsGetPathPkParameters Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns all column names that are defined by path parameters in the route.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Crud
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public static IReadOnlyList<RequestParameter> GetPathPkParameters(
	this ICrudModel crud
)

Parameters

crud
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.CrudICrudModel

Return Value

Type: IReadOnlyListRequestParameter

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type ICrudModel. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
Remarks
The method also returns non-primary key column names.
